title: ToolConfig
description: Represents the complete configuration for a command-line tool.

availability_check.description: Runtime availability probe executed at server startup.

guidance_key.description: Key to look up hardcoded guidance

input_schema.description: Generated input schema (optional - auto-generated from subcommands)

install_instructions.description: Installation guidance displayed when the tool is unavailable.

livelog.description: Live log monitoring configuration. Required when `tool_type` is `Livelog`.

monitor_level.description:
Default log monitor level for this tool. When set, all invocations of this tool
will have live log monitoring enabled at this severity.
Values: "error", "warn", "info", "debug", "trace"

monitor_stream.description:
Which stream to monitor for log patterns (default: "stderr").
Values: "stderr", "stdout", "both"

sequence.description: Optional sequence of tools to execute in order (for composite tools)

step_delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds between sequence steps (default: SEQUENCE_STEP_DELAY_MS)

synchronous.description:
Override the default execution mode for this tool.
- `true`: Always run synchronously (blocking, returns result immediately)
- `false`: Always run asynchronously (non-blocking, returns operation ID)
- `null`/omitted: Use server default (async unless --sync CLI flag)

Inheritance: Subcommand-level settings override tool-level settings.

timeout_seconds.description: Default timeout for operations in seconds

tool_type.description:
Tool type classifier. Defaults to `Command` for normal CLI tools.
Set to `Livelog` for long-running log-streaming tools that pipe output through an LLM.

AvailabilityCheck.description: Defines how to probe for tool or subcommand availability at runtime.

args.description: Arguments passed to the availability probe.

command.description: Optional override for the executable to invoke during the check. Defaults to the tool command.

skip_subcommand_args.description: If true, do not append derived subcommand arguments when constructing the probe command.

working_directory.description: Working directory used for the probe (defaults to project root).

CommandOption.description: Configuration for a single command-line option.

LivelogConfig.description:
Configuration for a `tool_type: livelog` tool.

A livelog tool spawns a long-running source command (e.g. `adb logcat`),
accumulates output into chunks, and periodically asks an LLM whether the chunk
contains issues matching the `detection_prompt`.  When an issue is found, a
`ProgressUpdate::LogAlert` notification is pushed to the MCP client.

chunk_max_lines.description:
Maximum number of lines to accumulate before sending a chunk to the LLM.
Defaults to 50.

chunk_max_seconds.description:
Maximum time in seconds to wait before sending a partial chunk to the LLM.
Defaults to 30.

cooldown_seconds.description:
Minimum time in seconds between consecutive LLM alerts for this tool.
Prevents alert storms when many lines match in quick succession.  Defaults to 60.

detection_prompt.description:
Plain-English description of what to look for, passed to the LLM as the
detection criteria (e.g. "Look for crashes, exceptions, or ANR errors").

llm_timeout_seconds.description:
Maximum time in seconds to wait for the LLM to respond to a single request.
Defaults to 30.

source_command.description: The executable to run as the log source (e.g. `"adb"`, `"ssh"`, `"tail"`).

LlmProviderConfig.description: Connection details for an OpenAI-compatible LLM provider.

api_key.description: Optional bearer token. Omit for local models that don't require authentication.

base_url.description:
Base URL of the API endpoint, e.g. `http://localhost:11434/v1` (Ollama)
or `https://api.openai.com/v1`.

SequenceStep.description: Represents a single step in a tool sequence

args.description: Arguments to pass to the tool

skip_if_file_exists.description: Skip this step if the specified file exists

skip_if_file_missing.description: Skip this step if the specified file is missing

tool.description: Name of the tool to invoke

SubcommandConfig.description: Configuration for a subcommand, allowing for nested commands.

availability_check.description: Runtime availability probe executed at server startup.

guidance_key.description: Key to look up hardcoded guidance

install_instructions.description: Installation guidance displayed when the subcommand is unavailable.

positional_args.description: Optional arguments that are not flags, but positional values.

positional_args_first.description:
When true, positional args are placed BEFORE options in the command line.
Required for commands like `find` where path must precede expressions.
Default: false (options come first, then positional args)

sequence.description: Optional sequence of tools to execute in order (for composite tools)

step_delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds between sequence steps (default: SEQUENCE_STEP_DELAY_MS)

synchronous.description:
Override the default execution mode for this subcommand.
- `true`: Always run synchronously (blocking, returns result immediately)
- `false`: Always run asynchronously (non-blocking, returns operation ID)
- `null`/omitted: Inherit from tool level, or use server default if tool doesn't specify

Inheritance: Subcommand-level settings override tool-level settings.

timeout_seconds.description: Override timeout for this specific subcommand

ToolHints.description: Provides hints to an AI agent on how to use a tool.

ToolType.description: Classifier that determines how the MCP service routes a tool invocation.

oneOf.description: Long-running log source piped through an LLM for issue detection.
